sourceSummary.oneLine: Supplier approval package for BLUE_1417 DECO_SHEET(ABYZ), part no. MSH-100100, issued by 모아스크린 to ㈜H&abyz.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used to approve the part, materials, revision history, QC process, and inspection basis for mass production of BLUE_1417 DECO_SHEET(ABYZ).
keyPoints: Approval sheet identifies product name BLUE_1417 DECO_SHEET(ABYZ) and model/drawing no. MSH-100100.
Customer is ㈜H&abyz and supplier/manufacturer is 모아스크린.
Revision history records Rev. 0 on 2025.08.14 as initial issue and Rev. 1 on 2025.10.15 for shape change.
Material list includes omay PC Film G42, ST-9108 double-sided tape, and PAS 800 ink, with ND listed for hazardous substance non-use certificate items.
QC process chart is marked for mass production and SOP control plan category.
